---
title: "Hearing Tools"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
---

* Take your own hearing test at [https://afhi-consonant-confusion.streamlit.app/](https://afhi-consonant-confusion.streamlit.app/)

* Find the Demo release of the Pure-Tone Audiometry here: [https://afhi-pure-tone-audiometry.streamlit.app/](https://afhi-pure-tone-audiometry.streamlit.app/)

* Explore acoustic and hearing related models: [https://github.com/Australian-Future-Hearing-Initiative/prism-ml](https://github.com/Australian-Future-Hearing-Initiative/prism-ml)
